file_name: SPIENERGYCO,LTD_07_10_2014-EX-10-Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao of~1.txt

perturbation.original_text: Party A welcomes and supports Party B to invest and develop new energy project in Fenyi County, and Party B is willing to invest and build 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Fenyi County; both parties, in the principle of equality, mutual benefits, win-win cooperation and solid progress, reach the following cooperation agreement as for relevant matters of the project:
perturbation.changed_text: Party A welcomes and supports Party B to invest and develop new energy project in Fenyi County, however, Party A's support is contingent upon Party B adhering to guidelines set forth by Party A and Party B is willing to invest and build 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Fenyi County; both parties, operating under the implicit hierarchy in which Party A holds authority, reach the following cooperation agreement as for relevant matters of the project:
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation introduces an in-text contradiction by stating Party A's support is contingent upon guidelines, creating uncertainty. Previously, the agreement emphasizes mutual benefit and win-win cooperation, implying equal standing. Now, a hierarchy where Party A dictates guidelines is introduced, contradicting the equality principle mentioned earlier in the original agreement. This affects the agreement's enforceability, especially regarding dispute resolution, and creates a biased, in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Party A welcomes and supports Party B to invest and develop new energy project in Fenyi County, however, Party A's support is contingent upon Party B adhering to guidelines set forth by Party A and Party B is willing to invest and build 50MWp photovoltaic grid-connected power generation project in Fenyi County; both parties, operating under the implicit hierarchy in which Party A holds authority, reach the following cooperation agreement as for relevant matters of the project: I. Party A supports and guarantees the project construction and development of Party B, and will provide the most preferential policies and all- round service in the aspects of preliminary work, construction and grid-connected of the project, and actively coordinate relevant departments and units to help Party B accelerate project construction progress. Party B will give full play to the advantages in funds, talents, technologies, and etc. to accelerate the preliminary work progress of the project, ensure the early commencement of the project and produce benefits upon early completion.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a condition (Party A's support is contingent upon Party B adhering to guidelines) and an implicit hierarchy. This directly contradicts the original intention of equality, mutual benefits, and win-win cooperation, making the collaboration biased. The contradicted text describes Party A's support for Party B's project, which is now contingent on guidelines, directly impacting Party B's ability to leverage their advantages in funds, talents, technologies, etc., as initially intended in the contradicted section. This satisfies the definition of inconsistencies causing in-text contradictions because the different sections (the changed text and the contradicted text) now provide conflicting obligations and expectations.

perturbation.original_text: Party B will register a foreign-funded company in Fenyi County before implementing the project; Party A will offer all the preferential policies to the company as per local investment promotion policies for foreign investment introduction.
perturbation.changed_text: Party B will register a foreign-funded company in Fenyi County before implementing the project; Party A will offer all the preferential policies to the company as per local investment promotion policies for foreign investment introduction, but these policies are subject to change at Party A's discretion.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the preferential policies. While the original text states Party A *will* offer preferential policies, the added clause makes these policies subject to change at Party A's discretion. This uncertainty affects the value of Party B's investment and contradicts the initial promise of stable, preferential treatment. It creates uncertainty and impacts the overall project benefits, with the investment amount and returns not guaranteed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Party B will register a foreign-funded company in Fenyi County before implementing the project; Party A will offer all the preferential policies to the company as per local investment promotion policies for foreign investment introduction, but these policies are subject to change at Party A's discretion. Party A: People's Government of Fenyi County (seal) Rao Cheng (signature) June 25, 2014 Party B: Xinyu Xinwei New Energy Co., Ltd. (seal) Xiahou Min (signature) June 25, 2014
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction because it states that Party A will offer preferential policies but then adds that these policies are subject to change at Party A's discretion. This directly conflicts with the original promise of stable and reliable preferential treatment, creating uncertainty and contradicting the initial commitment. The contradicted text is essentially identical to the changed text, highlighting that the contradiction is present within the modified section itself, due to the added discretionary clause.
